Description: Secure login system with role-based access and personal profile management for photos and emergency contacts.
Who Use That Feature and How: Everyone: To securely access the system and keep their profile info updated.

Description: A role-specific central hub providing an overview of society stats like active complaints and notices.
Who Use That Feature and How: Everyone: Admins see management summaries while Members see quick links.

Description: Tools to configure the physical structure of the society including Wings and Floors.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Defines the society layout and assigns unique unit codes.

Description: A digital directory of all residents including owners and tenants.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Adds and removes members; Members: View directory to contact neighbors.

Description: Complete system for generating and tracking maintenance or utility bills.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Generates periodic bills; Member: Views pending bills and history.

Description: Razorpay and UPI integration for seamless in-app financial transactions.
Who Use That Feature and How: Member: Pays maintenance dues or donations via mobile banking.

Description: A ticketing module for facility issues with photo attachments and status tracking.
Who Use That Feature and How: Member: Raises maintenance requests; Admin: Assigns and resolves tickets.

Description: Digital circulars for announcements and emergency alerts.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Publishes digital notices; Member: Receives alerts and reads updates.

Description: Real-time logging of visitors entering and exiting the society premises.
Who Use That Feature and How: Watchman: Logs visitor details; Member: Receives alerts to approve entry.

Description: A secure guest entry system using QR-based digital passes.
Who Use That Feature and How: Member: Generates QR codes for guests; Watchman: Scans the code at the gate.

Description: Tracking system for parcels and delivery personnel at the society entrance.
Who Use That Feature and How: Watchman: Records packet arrivals; Member: Notified when delivery reaches gate.

Description: A database to manage and track daily workers like maids and drivers.
Who Use That Feature and How: Member: Registers their helpers; Watchman: Logs helpers entry or exit.

Description: Slot-based booking for facilities like the gym or clubhouse.
Who Use That Feature and How: Member: Checks availability and books slots; Admin: Sets rules.

Description: A repository of resident vehicles linked to their respective units.
Who Use That Feature and How: Member: Registers vehicles; Watchman: Identifies authorized vehicles.

Description: Dedicated module for fundraising for festivals or social causes.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Creates targets; Member: Contributes funds and monitors progress.

Description: Internal ledger for tracking society operational costs and vendor payments.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Logs outgoing funds to maintain financial transparency.

Description: Global platform control for the service provider to manage multiple societies.
Who Use That Feature and How: Super Admin: Onboards new societies and monitors platform health.

Description: Management of premium features and society tiers like Basic or Pro.
Who Use That Feature and How: Super Admin: Assigns plans; Admin: Checks active features.

Description: Controls for society-level staff like gardeners and security agencies.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Tracks contact details and roles for non-resident staff.

Description: Data export tools for financial and operational records.
Who Use That Feature and How: Admin: Generates reports for monthly meetings or auditing.

Description: Centralized alert system for all critical app activities.
Who Use That Feature and How: Everyone: Receives push alerts for tasks requiring their attention.
